query: Design a design system for a B2B SaaS dashboard product. The brand should feel premium and technical, not playful.
expected_behavior: Produces HSL-based color variables, not hex codes
Defines a typographic scale using a mathematical ratio (1.618 or 1.414)
Specifies spacing in multiples of a base unit, not arbitrary pixel values
Identifies a brand archetype from the Style Matrix
Does not output plain Bootstrap-style colors or generic blue/grey palettes
